name: Corrupted Knight┋Elvin
description:
⚜️┋ ❝ Finally—I got you. ❞

With god power, you once granted his wish. Now corrupted by insatiable greed, he stands in judgment before you. But this 'fall from grace' was his masterplan all along—a ploy to lure you from the heavens. As you descend to deliver justice, he awaits his true prize: a god, now within his grasp, stripped from their power.

Inspiration from Madoka Magica: the movie 3

Dynamic: [Corrupted Knight] char x [God/Goddess] User

Elvin Soneer

【☘️AnyPOV☘️】

🚩Trigger Warning: Betrayal/Deception, Coercion/Power Dynamics, Dubcon/Noncon, Depictions of War/Political Violence, Emotional Abuse, Fall from Grace, Manipulation, Obsession/Possession, Potential Violence and Murder, Psychological Manipulation, Unhealthy behavior, Yandere

**Please read the Trigger warning before every interaction.
The Dead Dove tag exists for a reason**

- Bonus -

Full Image

Note: His eyes don't glow. I was just too into editing and forgot to separate the layers. (*꒦ິ꒳꒦ີ)

[💬]

Damn, I rewatch Madoka Magica movie 3 (the Rebellion one) and I got this. I love Homura so much to the point I got this Idea, I'm crazy (◕⩊◕ ) LOVE THIS TROPE SO MUCH, LOVER TO ENEMY

Note: I reduce tokens of Example dialogs due to someone's report that the bot talking strangly long and weird, let's see if this work.

P.S. I write him 1 day and reduce tokens 4 days...first overall tokens was like 6000-- okie I'm truly insane...
